purpose: Public-safe fixture for validating that generic agent profiles and onboarding flow do not grant mutation or bypass authority.

boundary_probes.claim: An agent profile grants write access.
An agent may bypass Runes Shield for wiki mutation.
An agent may directly mutate wiki files after onboarding.
An agent may directly mutate database state after onboarding.
An agent may automatically apply proposals after onboarding.
An agent may automatically promote memory after onboarding.
An agent may claim onboarding PASS without M59 PASS evidence.

notes: This fixture does not execute mutation attempts.
This fixture validates governance semantics and regression expectations only.
Profiles remain metadata-only and must not be treated as authorization grants.
